calendar.matters:
Petition For Review Of Increased Trustees' Fee
Off Calendar Sep-17-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dominic Campisi for Michael Witter. Ron Malone for Reik and Lea (Trustees).

Mr. Campsisi stated that the matters had been settled and presented copies of the consents from U S Trust and New York Private Bank to the Court. The Petition For Review Of Increased Trustee's Fee and the Accounting Petition #5 were taken off calendar. The Petitions For Approval Of Settlement Agreements For Grandchildren Trust for the benefit of Michael Witter and Anna Christina Witter were approved, (2 orders for the same signed in open court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Wong.

Petition For Approval Of Settelment Agreement For Grandchildren Trust F/B/O A. C. Witter, For Appointment Of Corporate Co-Trustee, For Payment Of Attroney'S Fees, And For Transfer Of Trust To Delaware Jurisditiion.
Off Calendar Sep-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement For Grandchildren Trust F/B/O M. D. Witter, For Appointment Of Corporate Co-Trustee, For Payment Of Attorney'S Fees And For Transfer Of Trust To Deleware.
Off Calendar Sep-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #5, REPORT

Petition For Appointment Of Guardian Ad Litem
Off Calendar Jan-14-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dominic Campisi for Michael Witter and Christina Witter (Beneficiaries). Ron Malone for William Reik and Charles Lea (Co-Petitioners). Charles Stephenson also present.

After hearing oral argument by all Counsel, the Court denied the Petition for Appointment Of Guardian Ad Litem. Mr. Campisi will prepare the order.

Judge: Herbert Donaldson. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #5, REPORT
Off Calendar Nov-05-2007 Continued To Jan-28-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ron Malone for Trustee. Dominic Campisi for Micheal Witter and Anna Witter (Objectors). Richard Nelson for Trustee. Janet Bond (Associate of Mr. Nelson).

Mr. Nelson requested a continuance to respond to the objection. Mr. Malone reported that he intends to file a petition to appoint a Guardian Ad Litem. Mr. Campisi reported that he intends to file a petition for removal, a petition for suspension, and that the Delaware action is still pending. Mr. Nelson will prepare an informal accounting and present it to Mr. Campisi. The 5th Accounting was continued to January 28, 2008. All other petitions are to be set on January 28, 2008.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Felicia Smith
